title: Sauna (Death Star)
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Noncanon|legends=1}}

[[File:Spa.jpg|thumb|250px|Exterior view of the sauna.]]

This '''sauna''', located on the surface of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] provided [[Stormtrooper/Legends|enlisted men]] a place to relax. [[Beach trooper]]s were often stationed there.<ref name="LEGO II">''[[LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[Leland Chee]] has stated that, while most items, like the [[supercoaster]] and [[Ferris Wheel]] are entered for fun, much of the other information is included in the [[Holocron continuity database]], and is [[canon]]. The inclusion of the sauna is a nod to ''[[LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy]]'', another [[LucasArts]] game, where the spa appears in a hidden area on the Death Star.<ref name="Holocron thread">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1075#16045442|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-12-13|time=4:49 PM}}</ref>

==Appearances==
[[File:Just_wrong.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Beach trooper]]s in the sauna.]]
*''[[Death Star Designer]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy]]''
*''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]''
